Combat sport events in 2021
ONE: Winter Warriors II
The poster for ONE: Winter Warriors II
PromotionONE Championship
DateDecember 3, 2021 (2021-12-03)
(aired December 17, 2021)
VenueSingapore Indoor Stadium
CityKallang, Singapore
Event chronology
ONE: Winter Warriors ONE: Winter Warriors II ONE: Heavy Hitters

ONE: Winter Warriors II (also known as ONE 149: Philippines vs. the World) was a Combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on December 3, 2021 and aired on December 17, 2021, at the Singapore Indoor Stadium in Kallang, Singapore.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

The event was headlined by a flyweight bout between former ONE Flyweight World Champion Kairat Akhmetov and Danny Kingad.[3]

A bantamweight bout between Kwon Won Il and former ONE Bantamweight Champion Kevin Belingon served as the co-main event.[4]

Former ONE Middleweight World Champion Vitaly Bigdash and Fan Rong took place at a catchweight of 209 pounds.[5]

Results

[edit]
Main Card (YouTube/ONE Super App)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Flyweight Kairat Akhmetov def. Danny Kingad Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Kwon Won Il def. Kevin Belingon KO (punch to the body) 2 0:52
Catchweight (209 lbs) Vitaly Bigdash def. Fan Rong Submission (guillotine choke) 3 0:41
Welterweight Murad Ramazanov def. Zebaztian Kadestam Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Stephen Loman def. Yusup Saadulaev TKO (punches) 1 4:09
Bantamweight Jhanlo Mark Sangiao def. Paul Lumihi Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 1:41
Lead Card (Facebook/YouTube/ONE Super App)
Lightweight Kickboxing Arian Sadiković def. Mustapha Haida Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight Fabrício Andrade def. Li Kai Wen TKO (punches) 1 4:41
Catchweight (127.5 lbs) Muay Thai Joseph Lasiri def. Asahi Shinagawa KO (punch and knee) 1 2:05 [a]
  1. ^ Shinagawa missed weight (127.5 lbs).

[6]

  4. ^ Henry, Blaine (9 December 2021). "Kwon Won Il: "I believe that I deserve the next shot at the title when I beat [Belingon]"". mymmanews.com. Retrieved 9 December 2021.
  5. ^ Pascua, Duane Lucas. "What's the Story: Vitaly Bigdash vs. Fan Rong at ONE Championship: Winter Warriors II". sportskeeda.com. Retrieved 9 December 2021.
  6. ^ "ONE: Winter Warriors II". ONE Championship – The Home of Martial Arts. 23 November 2021. Retrieved 2021-11-26.
